falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 Index closes above 5500 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above key resistance would invalidate the HOLD signal by confirming a bullish trend contrary to the bottom pattern assumption

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff Score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would contradict the current 41 level, proving the model's uncertainty was misplaced by showing clear overbought conditions

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NYSE exceeds 20% above 14-day average for 5 straight days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would falsify the HOLD by demonstrating market conviction in a direction, breaking the pattern's ambiguity

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
